mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in 60% of rate decline periods.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in retail sales exceeding 2.0% signals accelerating consumer spending that directly boosts corporate earnings expectations, driving positive equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 55% of triggered months or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the unemployment rate and increases in total nonfarm payrolls indicate a tightening labor market that raises wage inflation expectations, prompting equity valuation compression over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces positive forward returns in over 65% of occurrences or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month contractions in industrial production signal supply chain bottlenecks that trigger immediate risk-off positioning, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Weekly forward returns remain positive in 70% of contraction periods or the signal fails to predict direction during post-shock recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index rises above 235.0, inflation expectations force markets to price in aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns are positive in more than 60% of months where the index exceeds the threshold or the predictive power vanishes when inflation remains below 230.0.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts combined with expanding real GDP indicate synchronized residential and broad economic expansion that supports corporate revenue growth, yielding positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in over 55% of quarters or the interaction effect is indistinguishable from zero in panel regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect strengthening economic activity that improves corporate profit forecasts, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over a 5-year rolling window or payroll growth fails to correlate with positive equity returns in out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth during periods of elevated unemployment signals pent-up demand fulfillment that triggers short-covering rallies, generating positive equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Weekly returns are negative in 65% of acceleration periods or the signal loses predictive power once unemployment falls below 4.0%.
